
_C0 ==== Target Camera =========
_L 0x00000000 0x00000000
_C1  TC Auto-activate (on quest entry)
_L 0xE0020000 0x001E0400
_L 0xE1010000 0x015A9862
_L 0x001E0400 0x00000001
_C1  TC Enable (L+DpadUp)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000110
_L 0x001E0400 0x00000001
_C1  TC Disable (L+DpadDown)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000140
_L 0x001E0400 0x00000000
_C1  TC Select monster 1 (L+DpadLeft)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000180
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000000
_C1  TC Select monster 2 (L+DpadRight)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000120
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000004
_C0  TC Wrap and filter
_L 0xE001000C 0x30000C00
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000000
_L 0xE00100FC 0x30000C00
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000008
_L 0xE0010004 0x30000C00
_L 0xE0010000 0x015A9866
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000000
_L 0xE0010008 0x30000C00
_L 0xE0010000 0x015A986A
_L 0x00000C00 0x00000000
